codeReview.summary: Implementation is complete and correct. Added DynamicWeights type for query-time weight adjustment to computeMatchScore function. Includes validateDynamicWeights() for 0-1 range validation, mergeScoringWeights() and mergeHybridBlend() for merging with defaults, and updated computeMatchScore(), computeRuleScore(), computeSkillDimension(), and computeLegacySkillDimension() to use effective weights. Backward compatibility maintained when weights not provided.

assertionsValidated: VAL-WEIGHTS-001: Query-time weights parameter accepted in options
VAL-WEIGHTS-002: Backward compatibility - default behavior unchanged when weights not provided
VAL-WEIGHTS-003: Individual weight components can be overridden
VAL-WEIGHTS-004: Invalid weights (negative, >1, NaN) throw validation error
VAL-WEIGHTS-005: HYBRID_BLEND (rule/vector ratio) can be overridden
summary: PASS: Implementation is complete, well-tested (31 passing tests), and follows project conventions. All 5 validation contract assertions are covered. No regressions in recency or quality features. Code quality is high with proper TypeScript typing and validation.
